name: opencli-plugin-huawei-3ms
description: Huawei's 3MS 知识管理社区 (3ms.huawei.com) — `search` returns the top N most relevant documents (title, type, author, source, date, summary, doc_id, detail_url) from the 3MS搜索 full-text search; `read` fetches one document's full body by docId. Requires a logged-in Huawei session via the OpenCLI Browser Bridge.
